scenarioName: Get Booking Details - Before T-5h Reveal Window (Companions Hidden)
objective: Validate that companion information is hidden (companions: null) when current time is before the T-5h reveal window

seedData.description: Client user who owns the booking
User account for vice captain companion
Booking with startAt MORE than 5 hours in the future (current time < startAt - 5 hours)
Duo assignments for the booking (exist in DB but should not be revealed)

steps.layman: Client requests to view their booking details before the T-5h reveal window

expectedBehavior: Verify caller is the booking owner
steps.layman: System verifies the caller is the booking owner

expectedBehavior: Result: reveal = false (current time < startAt - 5 hours)
steps.layman: System determines companions should NOT be revealed because we're outside the T-5h window
System returns booking details with companions set to null

expectedBehavior: Validate all required fields are present
Validate companions field exists and is null
Validate no companion information leaked in response
steps.layman: Verify companions field is null and no companion info is exposed before reveal window

api: companions field is present and equals null
authorization: Only booking owner (CLIENT role) can access
businessRules: Companions hidden when current time < (startAt - 5 hours)
Timed reveal enforced per SDS v1.2.0 section 4.D
Privacy protection: companions not revealed too early

notes: Tests timed reveal boundary: before T-5h window
Validates companions: null when reveal condition not met
Per SDS v1.2.0 section 4.D: companions null when current time < (startAt - 5 hours)
Companion assignments exist in DB but are not revealed to client yet
